ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price entry belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on the given date */,
  "split" REAL /* Split factor on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the indicator entry belongs to */,
  "ma_50" REAL /* 50-day Moving Average of the stock */,
  "ma_200" REAL /* 200-day Moving Average of the stock */,
  "macd" REAL /* MACD of the stock */,
  "signal_line" REAL /* Signal Line of the stock */,
  "rsi_7" REAL /* RSI-7 of the stock */,
  "rsi_14" REAL /* RSI-14 of the stock */,
  "percent_r" REAL /* Percent R of the stock */,
  "bollinger_bands" REAL /* Bollinger Bands of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the dashboard belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the dashboard is for */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the dashboard is for */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES technical_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the alert belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert the notification was for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report was generated for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the trading signal is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trading signal was generated */,
  "signal" REAL /* Value of the trading signal */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trading signal (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the trend is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trend was identified */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Value of the trend (e.g., Up, Down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock, forex, crypto) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the trend is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the trend was identified */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Value of the trend (e.g., Up, Down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ipo_calendars" (
  "ipo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IPO entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the IPO entry is for */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the IPO */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the IPO was listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ipo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ipo_calendars_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_calendars" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the earnings entry is for */,
  "earnings_date" TEXT /* Date of the earnings */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_calendars_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the dividend entry is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id")
)
